name: Argan Oil
description: Liquid gold from Morocco — a non-greasy oil rich in linoleic acid and vitamin E for soft, luminous skin.
scientificSummary: Contains 80% unsaturated fatty acids (oleic and linoleic) and is rich in tocopherols (vitamin E), squalene, and polyphenols.
mechanismOfAction: Linoleic acid restores barrier integrity while tocopherols provide antioxidant protection and improve skin feel.

seo.title: Argan Oil - Morocco's Liquid Gold for Skin | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover how Argan Oil nourishes, softens, and adds a healthy glow to skin without greasiness.
